title: Skeleton Wooden Halloween Door Sign Round Welcome Sign Front Door Hanger Scary Spooky Halloween Wooden Hanging Plaque Wall Decor For Home Party Indoor Outdoor 20x20cm Black
features: 【Size】Halloween Wooden Sign: 7.9x7.9inches (20x20cm), Approx. 0.5 cm/ 0.2 Inches In Thickness. Just The Right Size Wooden Halloween Welcome Sign To Meet Your Decoration Needs, Suitable For Indoor And Outdoor Hanging.

【Material】The Halloween Door Decoration Is Made Of Quality Wooden, Which Is Sturdy, Strong And Does Not Warp Or Fade, It Has A Long Service Life. The Halloween Hanging Sign Is Beautifully Printed, With Vivid Colours And A Smooth Texture.

【Classic Halloween Element】The Halloween Sign Decorations Features A Skeleton Pattern Paired With The Word "Welcome"And A Bat Design.The Halloween Wooden Hanging Perfectly Matches The Halloween Theme, Instantly Creating A Spooky Atmosphere.

【Easy To Hang】The Hanging Rope Is Already Attached To The Halloween Sign, So No Additional Work Is Required. Simply Hang The Halloween Door Sign On A Wall, Door, Porch, Etc. To Quickly Add A Halloween Festive Atmosphere.

【Wide Application】Our Halloween Black Skeleton Sign With A Sturdy Rope That Can Be Easily Hanging On Front Door, Porch,Haunted House,Garden,Doorway, Wall And Anywhere You Like, Black And White Colors Halloween Sign Add A Touch Of Spooky To Your Halloween Festival Party.
description: Product Description KASESSS Transform Your Space Into A Spooky Halloween Haven With Our 20x20cm Halloween Wooden Hanging Sign! This Durable Plaque Showcases A Striking Skeleton Design Paired With “Welcome” Lettering, Complemented By Bats – Iconic Symbols That Scream Halloween. Specification Product type: halloween welcome sign shape: round product size: about 20x 20cm color: black Package Including: 1 x halloween wooden sign
